query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as mismatch_count,
  SUM(ABS(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))) as total_diff
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) > 0.01;
command:

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as mismatch_count,
  SUM(ABS(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)))) as total_diff
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) - CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) > 0.01;
